text.title: Spatial Computing Overview Procedure
text.summary: 5-step procedure to produce a defensible 2026 platform-selection decision record.

step.name: classify-use-case
step.action: Pick `use_case` from {productivity, entertainment, training, industrial, social}. Pick `audience` from {consumer, prosumer, enterprise}. List `content_types` from the closed enum.

step.name: pull-2026-data
step.action: Fetch latest IDC tracker, vendor SEC filings, store policy docs (≥2025). Build `templates/platform-comparison-matrix.csv`.
step.decision-gate: If any source is pre-2024, re-pull before scoring.

step.name: score-platforms
step.action: Score each platform 0-5 on install_base / sdk_maturity / audience_fit / content_type_fit / store_constraints. Each score MUST cite ≥1 evidence source.

step.name: recommend-primary-and-fallback
step.action: Pick highest-aggregate-fit primary. Pick ≥1 fallback (often WebXR for cross-platform reach). Draft rationale ≥40 chars + risk notes.
step.decision-gate: If primary chosen on install_base alone but audience_fit ≤2, re-evaluate.

step.name: red-team-review
step.action: Route to a second agent or human reviewer. Run validator. Update risk_notes for any challenge that passes.
